en: The teacher is here.

ch: B:不要再玩了，快坐在座位上。
en: Stop playing and quickly sit in your seat.
Sorry, I’m late!
Come in quickly.
What day is it today?

ab: kaysa’an minay haseb ka Sinangayan, rim’aen maSangay, ta’ila tapanpanra:an!
ch: B:今天星期五，明天放假，一起出去玩吧!
en: It’s Friday today, we have a day off tomorrow. Let’s go out and play together!
Great! Let’s go to the riverside.
What day will it be tomorrow?

ab: rim’aen ’ima minay to:o’ ka Sinangayan, rim’aen hila:an ta’ila rima’ tapakakSiyae’ ka mali’!
ch: B:明天星期三，我們明天下午去玩球吧!
en: Tomorrow will be Wednesday. Let’s go play ball tomorrow afternoon!

ab: rim’aen ririm’aenan So’o ’am powa’ ka kano’?
en: What will you be doing tomorrow morning?

ab: rim’aen kaSangayan, ya:o ’am ki ’oya’ rima’ kiyokay.
ch: B:明天是星期日，我要和媽媽去教會。
en: Tomorrow will be Sunday, I will be going to church with my mom.
What’s wrong?
I feel like vomiting. I need to go to the restroom.
I feel dizzy.
Lie down and rest.

ab: kamatortoroe’, yako biSbiS ka tiyal, ’am rima’ kata’owan.
ch: A:老師，我肚子痛，要去廁所。
en: Teacher, I have a stomachache. I need to go to the restroom.
Okay, go quickly.
May I go wash my hands?
It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.

ab: kamatortoroe’, yako biSbiS a tomalan ka ta’oeloeh, sizaeh ila komsi’ael ’am maSangay.
ch: A:老師，我頭好痛，下午要請假。
en: It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.
Okay, take care and go home.

ab: kamatortoroe’, mowa:i’ ’aehae’ naehan minay ’aehae’ ka Sinangayan yako ’am maSangay, yako ’am rima’ pakita’ ka sinsang.
ch: A:老師，我下禮拜一要請假，我要去看醫生。
en: Teacher, I need to take a sick leave next Monday. I have to see a doctor.
Alright, take care of yourself.
Where is ’away?

ab: siya biSbiS ka tiyal, siya ’ay kata’owan.
en: She has a stomachache. She’s in the restroom.
Where is ’obay?

ab: kamatortoroe’, ’obay biSbiS ka kaSlar, kaysa’an maSangay.
en: Teacher, ’obay has a sore throat. She took a sick leave today.
Why didn’t toway come?
She has a fever.
